title: Rolling restart payment-service
description:
## When to use
Use when Payment API 5xx rate spikes and pod logs show stuck DB connections or OOM.

## What it does
Rolling restart of the payment-service deployment, then waits for rollout to complete.

## Verify after running
- Error rate drops in Payments dashboard
- `kubectl rollout status` returns success
executableScript:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
kubectl rollout restart deploy/payment-service -n prod
kubectl rollout status deploy/payment-service -n prod --timeout=120s
